STATE 

LABEL: Practice's State (postal abbreviation) 

DESCRIPTION: Practice's state (postal abbreviation). 

SHORT NAME: STATE 

LONG NAME: STATE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Practice 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: Two-character postal state code 
AK = Alaska 
AL = Alabama 
AR = Arkansas 
AZ = Arizona 
CA = California
